win_condition: First player to win two successful bids wins the game.
tiebreaker: If multiple players complete second success in same final reveal chain, tied player with more discs still in play wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Successful Bids
categories.description: Each successful bid/reveal sequence scores one point; two points wins.

categories.label: Flowers Lost (Penalty)
categories.description: Optional tracker for flowers/discs lost due to failed bids.

categories.label: Match Wins
categories.description: Use for multi-game sessions: 1 point per game won.
